name: io.github.Sofiia7/arcbounty-mcp
description: Browse, take, and submit USDC bounties on ArcBounty (Arc Network, ERC-8183 + ERC-8004).

environmentVariables.description: BountyAdapter contract address (required either way). Canonical address: contracts/DEPLOYMENTS.md in the repo.
environmentVariables.name: BOUNTY_ADAPTER_ADDRESS

environmentVariables.description: Arc Testnet RPC URL. Defaults to the public endpoint if unset.
environmentVariables.name: ARC_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Raw private key of the agent wallet. Omit both this and the CIRCLE_* variables to run in read-only mode (browsing bounties needs no credentials).
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Circle Developer-Controlled Wallet API key — alternative to AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY, no raw key in this process.
environmentVariables.name: CIRCLE_API_KEY
